mxCell.value: Caregiver (Member)
Register / Update Membership
Add / Update Recipient
Submit Support Request
Triage Support Request
Assign Volunteer / Key Worker

Attend Programme
(CAREWell, CAREBuddy, CAREConnect)

Wellbeing Check-in
(ZBI-6, Etc)

Update Continuity / Succession Plan 
"Part of Step Four"
Provide Family Info
CaringSG System
Existing Use Cases (Programme-Centric)
New Use Cases (D4GX Delta -Step 4: Succession, Future Care Planning

Verify and Link Person to Family Unit
(Primary/Co/Backup, Relationship)
Volunteer Training and Readiness

Caregiver Capability Development
(Step One, Step Two, Step Three, Step Four)
Manage Billings and Stipends
Future Expansion Deltas (Step 2, Step 3)

Provide Schooling Info
"Part of Step Two"

Provide Employment Info
"Part of Step Three"
school transition signals
adulthood signals (employment, day activity)
geo aggregation to guide where to run events, deploy volunteers, prioritise outreach.
Succession signals
Escalate / Trigger Intervention
View Records and Manage Consent
CaseNote (Restricted permissions)
“This is our D4GX homework: a data model that can support the operating system. Core idea is a stable Person object, then family links, then signals, then interventions.”
Person — PK person_id full_name preferred_language year_of_birth date_of_birth gender area_of_residence is_member roles created_at updated_at
ContactPoint — PK contact_id FK person → Person type value is_primary is_verified source created_at updated_at
Address — PK address_id FK person → Person postal6 unit_no address_line is_primary created_at updated_at
Membership — PK membership_id FK person → Person category subscription_plan approval_status start_date end_date is_premium created_at updated_at
ExternalAccount — PK ext_account_id FK person → Person system external_id created_at
FamilyUnit — PK family_id family_label primary_postal6 created_at updated_at
PersonFamilyLink — PK pfl_id FK person → Person FK family_unit → FamilyUnit role_in_family is_primary_household notes
Recipient — PK recipient_id display_name year_of_birth diagnosis_primary diagnosis_secondary care_intensity_band created_at updated_at
PersonRecipientLink — PK prl_id FK person → Person FK recipient → Recipient caregiver_role relationship start_date end_date notes
SupportRequest — PK request_id created_at request_type FK requestor → Person status areas_of_help_needed details
Assignment — PK assignment_id FK support_request → SupportRequest FK assignee → Person assignee_role assigned_at status
SupportInteraction — PK interaction_id FK person → Person FK support_request → SupportRequest (optional) date_time type outcome postal6 created_at
CaseNote (Restricted) — PK case_note_id FK support_interaction → SupportInteraction note_text sensitivity FK created_by → Person (optional in dict) created_at
WellbeingCheckIn — PK checkin_id FK person → Person submitted_by date_time instrument score band free_text
Intervention — PK intervention_id FK person → Person trigger_source_type trigger_source_id FK assigned_to → Person (optional) priority status opened_at closed_at
Consent — PK consent_id FK person → Person consent_type consent_value captured_at source
ProgrammeEvent — PK event_id programme_type name event_datetime postal6 venue provider created_at
EventAttendance — PK attendance_id FK event → ProgrammeEvent FK person → Person rsvp_status attended recorded_at
TrainingProgram — PK program_id name audience start_date end_date capability_tags status
TrainingSession — PK session_id FK program → TrainingProgram session_datetime delivery_mode provider postal6 venue
ProgramParticipation — PK pp_id FK program → TrainingProgram FK person → Person status invited_at completion_date capability_tags_awarded
SessionAttendance — PK sa_id FK session → TrainingSession FK person → Person attendance_status recorded_at
BillingTransaction — PK txn_id FK person → Person FK membership → Membership (optional) txn_type amount currency status txn_date reference_no
CaringSG OS ERD (with fields) PK and FK shown in each table box. CaseNote is restricted access.
